summary: Crystal‑clear UltraMatrix recording of a well‑played Atlanta show with standout Foolish Heart, Death Don't and a smoking Stir It Up jam into the drums.
review: Both reviewers rave about this spring ’91 Atlanta performance, noting a solid setlist highlighted by Foolish Heart, Death Don't and an especially playful Stir It Up jam that flows seamlessly into the drum break. The UltraMatrix source delivers crystal‑clear, balanced audio that captures the band's energy without any noticeable flaws.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise (5‑star) for both musical performance and recording quality; standout songs and excellent matrix mix justify an near‑top rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crystal‑clear UltraMatrix mix; balanced blend of soundboard and audience with no hiss, dropouts, or muddiness reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Setlist not flashy but tightly executed; the little Stir It Up jam into Drums adds a special highlight and keeps the momentum rolling.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Even if his later‑year motivation waned, Jerry’s playful, “silly” guitar work shines on this show.
band_member_comments.Drums: The jam into the drum break is highlighted; drums lock in tightly with the band.
